title: thelypteris rigescens
intro: Thelypteris rigescens, also known as the Rock Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris rigescens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Thelypteris rigescens is often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
